series_metadata.series_description: File contains incomplete applications which may include the application, test results, correspondence, proof of liability insurance, litigation and other support documents required for those individuals and companies to apply for licensure or certification. License/certification application types include exhibitors, hotel/motels, underground storage tank (UST) installers, UST inspectors, reduced ignition propensity cigarettes (RIPC), storage of explosives, and fire protection equipment certification.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: paper copy in operating area one year ; Electronic: Maintain records one year date of application, unless litigation has been instituted. If litigation has been instituted, records that applicant will be maintained fifteen (15) years date litigation terminates
